rationale: For Romania, the ongoing Russia-Ukraine war remains background noise, while the near-concluded Iran deal could affect energy costs; no new qualitative regional security shifts this cycle.

top_events.title: Iran-US deal reported near, Khamenei funeral announced
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal remains close but unsigned; Khamenei's death and funeral signal a leadership transition that could affect energy markets and regional stability relevant to Romania's energy costs.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues near Romanian border
top_events.summary: No qualitative escalation this cycle; Black Sea security situation unchanged. Continuation of background threat level for Romania.

top_events.title: Switzerland population cap referendum
top_events.summary: A Swiss vote to cap population at 10 million could affect EU labor mobility and migration flows, with minor indirect relevance to Romania's emigrant workforce.
